name: Emergency Head CT Trauma
description: Emergency head CT for trauma evaluation

findings.technique: Non-contrast head CT was performed emergently for trauma evaluation.
findings.comparison: No prior studies available for comparison.

sections.name: Intracranial
sections.content: No acute intracranial hemorrhage. No midline shift. No mass effect.

sections.name: Ventricles
sections.content: Ventricles are normal in size. No hydrocephalus.

impression:
1. No acute intracranial hemorrhage.
2. No skull fracture.
3. Normal emergent head CT.
